title: An Act to Allow Teachers to Qualify for Overtime Pay
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Jan 27, 2026
last_house_action: 6/25/2025 - Carried over, in the same posture, to any special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 800.
last_senate_action: 1/27/2026 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Received by the Clerk of the House on February 20, 2025. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on LABOR pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
Carried over, in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
Reports READ . On motion of Representative ROEDER of Bangor, TABLED pending ACCEPTANCE of Either Report. Later today assigned.

Speaker laid before the House Subsequently, on motion of Representative ROEDER of Bangor the Bill and accompanying papers were COMMITTED to the Committee on LABOR . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Reports READ On motion by Senator TIPPING of Penobscot Bill and accompanying papers be COMMITTED to the Committee on LABOR in concurrence.
Carried over, in the same posture, to any special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 800.
Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
